title: dicranopteris pedalis var. litoralis
intro: Dicranopteris pedalis var. litoralis, also known as the coastal forked fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dicranopteris pedalis var. litoralis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed orally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
